§ 01Timeline Adjustment Required

Dear {{sellerName}},

We are writing to inform you that Gate {{gateNumber}} ({{gateName}}) requires additional time to clear. This is a normal part of the transaction process, and we want to ensure all requirements are properly satisfied before proceeding.

Extension Required
Gate {{gateNumber}} — {{gateName}}
{{originalDeadline}}
{{revisedDeadline}}
{{extensionDays}} days
§ 02Reason for Extension

The extension is required due to the following:

A.{{reasonTitle}}: {{reasonDescription}}

{{additionalContext}}

No Fault: This extension does not indicate any material issue with the transaction. It reflects the normal complexity of the ESOP process and our commitment to ensuring all requirements are properly satisfied.
§ 03Impact on Transaction

The extension impacts the timeline as follows:

1.Revised Closing Target: {{revisedClosingTarget}} (original: {{originalClosingTarget}})
2.120-Day Schedule: The schedule is adjusted accordingly; all subsequent gates shift by {{extensionDays}} days
3.No Fee Impact: The extension does not affect any fee obligations or milestone payments
§ 04What We Need From You

To clear Gate {{gateNumber}} by the revised deadline, please ensure:

A.{{actionItem1}}: {{actionItem1Details}}

B.{{actionItem2}}: {{actionItem2Details}}
